---
title: "Appendix"
---
## Raw Data 
- [EpicCollect5: Dashboard](https://five.epicollect.net/project/newark-parks-and-recreation-tree-inventory/data)
- [Google Spreadsheet: Raw Data Exported from EpicCollect5](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1CrADExohsLWq7vGZhaonv0nHoEUQfKkVnnjnETOM3Os/edit?usp=sharing)
- [Tree Photo Gallery](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/10HPgqNDYqSAtCczQflyiKSiRTvafz_Wb?usp=sharing)

## Diameter at Breast Height (DBH) Summary Statistics 

```{python}
#| echo: false

import pandas as pd 
trees = pd.read_csv("data/processedTreeData.csv")

table_trees = trees.drop(columns=["Latitude", "Longitude", "Tree ID", "Multi-branch?", "Notes", "Tree Condition"])
value_cols = ["DBH", "Tree Height", "Average Spread"]

summary = (
    trees
    .groupby(["Type of Significant Trees", "Site"])[value_cols[0]]
    .describe()
)

summary

```

**Table 3**: Diameter at Breast Height (DBH) Summary Statistics 

## Tree Height Summary Statistics 

```{python}
#| echo: false

summary = (
    trees
    .groupby(["Type of Significant Trees", "Site"])[value_cols[1]]
    .describe()
)

summary

```

**Table 4**: Tree Height Summary Statistics 

## Average Spread Summary Statistics 

```{python}
#| echo: false

summary = (
    trees
    .groupby(["Type of Significant Trees", "Site"])[value_cols[2]]
    .describe()
)

summary

```

**Table 5**: Average Spread Summary Statistics
